infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: IronSharp uses speech recognition to transcribe your devotional responses in Commute Mode.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: IronSharp uses your microphone to capture your spoken reflections in Commute Mode.

plugins.photosPermission: IronSharp uses your photos to set your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: IronSharp uses your camera to take a profile photo.
